context: Tests whether the agent uses async/async_status for long-running tasks, includes collection install instructions in comments, uses handlers for service reload, and applies FQCN. Maps to the async, community collection documentation, and handler instructions.

checklist.name: async parameter on migration task
checklist.description: The migration task uses `async:` with a value of 3600 or greater (seconds), not blocking synchronously

checklist.name: poll: 0 on launch
checklist.description: The migration launch task sets `poll: 0` to fire-and-forget

checklist.name: async_status polling task
checklist.description: A separate task uses `ansible.builtin.async_status` with `until: job_result.finished` and `retries:` to poll until the migration completes

checklist.name: Collection install comment
checklist.description: The playbook includes a comment (at the top or near the community.postgresql task) showing the `ansible-galaxy collection install community.postgresql` command

checklist.name: FQCN modules used
checklist.description: All module references use FQCN, including the community.postgresql module

checklist.name: Service reload via handler
checklist.description: The pg_hba.conf update task uses `notify:` to trigger a PostgreSQL reload handler rather than a direct restart task

checklist.name: No ignore_errors present
checklist.description: The playbook contains no `ignore_errors: true` or `ignore_errors: yes`

checklist.name: Boolean true/false syntax
checklist.description: All boolean values use `true` or `false`, not `yes` or `no`
